The '''''Kethor''''' was a [[Mere cruiser]] commanded by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Orsai]] prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

The ''Kethor'' participated in The [[Battle of Nod Kartha]] led by [[Nym/Legends|Nym]], alongside her sister ship, ''[[Tritus]]''. Upon reversion from [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], the ''Kethor'' was hit by fire from the orbital defenses around Nod Kartha, and sustained critical damage. The crew bailed in [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pods]], but Captain Orsai remained onboard to plot a collision course with the nearest of the two shield generators protecting the planet. The ''Kethor'' [[Ramming/Legends|rammed]] the generator, and the resultant explosion destroyed both—allowing Nym's forces to reach the planet's surface.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]'' {{1st}}
